54976.title: CNN Newsroom Sunday
54976.description: Updates of the latest news from around the world.

54977.title: CNN Newsroom Sunday
54977.description: Updates of the latest news from around the world.

54978.title: Fareed Zakaria GPS
54978.description: Host, columnist, and best-selling author Fareed Zakaria offers insightful analysis and interviews world leaders, artists, scientists, business leaders, global affairs analysts, and other cultural observers for the `Global Public Square'. Zakaria is also a syndicated columnist for The Washington Post, a contributing editor for The Atlantic magazine, and hosts in-depth, prime-time specials for CNN Worldwide. `Fareed Zakaria GPS' was launched in 2008 and each week's program airs worldwide on CNN, from New York or other locations around the world. The program is characterized by smart debate and discussion on world events and public affairs, designed to help viewers understand the world around them and the newest thinking on the globe's biggest challenges.

54979.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
54979.description: Stanley Tucci explores his former home: Tuscany. Stanley does a wine bar crawl, celebrates the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes that use stale bread as the key ingredient.

54980.title: African Voices Changemakers
54980.description: Following a Kenyan media producer who is on a mission to make the superhero genre more inclusive. Highlighting the visionary behind South Africa's first superhero comic book series.

54981.title: Marketplace Africa
54981.description: A look at the contemporary African art market. Given the wide range of applications, looking at how satellites are part of the solution when it comes to solving the connectivity gap in Africa.

54982.title: Marketplace Africa
54982.description: Kenya's apparel sector localizes its supply chain and the role of Kenya-based textile manufacturers; African designers looking for success internationally face unique hurdles.

54983.title: Connecting Africa
54983.description: From the CEO of a massive energy company in South Africa and fruit exporters in Egypt to the man who bought a bank in Nigeria, looking at all of the aspects of doing business in Africa.

54984.title: Inside Africa
54984.description: From superbikes to racecars and beyond, highlighting some of South Africa's fastest men and women on wheels and providing an inside look at what life is like on and off the race track.

54985.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
54985.description: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes presents the latest news and global events.

54986.title: World Sport
54986.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

54987.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
54987.description: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes presents the latest news and global events.

54988.title: CNN Newsroom with Kim Brunhuber
54988.description: Kim Brunhuber brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

54989.title: World Sport
54989.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

54990.title: CNN Newsroom with Kim Brunhuber
54990.description: Kim Brunhuber brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

54991.title: CNN Newsroom with Isa Soares
54991.description: Daily headlines and breaking stories live from CNN headquarters in Atlanta. The rotating cast of anchors and contributors include Carol Costello, Kyra Phillips, Suzanne Malveaux, Brooke Baldwin, Don Lemon, Randi Kaye and Fredricka Whitfield.

54992.title: Early Start
54992.description: An early start with news from Ashleigh Banfield and Zoraida Sambolin.

54993.title: New Day
54993.description: John Berman and Brianna Keilar report the latest news and top stories.

54994.title: World Sport
54994.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

54995.title: First Move with Julia Chatterley
54995.description: A look at the big stories developing as the US markets open, anchored from the floor of the NYSE.

54996.title: Connect the World
54996.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

54997.title: World Sport
54997.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

54998.title: Connect the World
54998.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

54999.title: Inside Politics
54999.description: With veteran Washington correspondent John King in the anchor chair, `Inside Politics' focuses on the top political stories of the day with a rotating round table of top sourced reporters from CNN and from other media outlets. The half-hour program gives viewers an inside look at the stories driving Washington, directly from reporters on the ground. Prior to its revival in 2014, `Inside Politics' was first headed by Judy Woodruff, and it aired for more than 20 years on CNN before its cancellation in 2005.

55000.title: Marketplace Africa
55000.description: A look at the contemporary African art market. Given the wide range of applications, looking at how satellites are part of the solution when it comes to solving the connectivity gap in Africa.

55001.title: Amanpour
55001.description: Peabody Award-winning journalist Christiane Amanpour, CNN's chief international correspondent, hosts this half-hour weeknight interview program, with each episode focusing on a newsworthy topic and featuring guests, from global leaders to heads of state and cultural icons, who are comfortable challenging conventional wisdom.

55002.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
55002.description: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

55003.title: Quest Means Business
55003.description: Richard Quest and a team of correspondents analyze the facts and figures from the business world to help people earn money and spend it wisely.

55004.title: Africa Avant Garde
55004.description: A look at some of the most influential living modern and contemporary artists as well as a visit to a museum which celebrates the best of contemporary African art.

55005.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
55005.description: CNN's chief Washington correspondent, Jake Tapper, hosts this hour-long weekday afternoon program, which covers all the day's top stories from around the country and the world, headlines that span politics, money, sports and popular culture. `The Lead' works to ensure that viewers are caught up on the stories that matter, often highlighting news that may have been overlooked. Prior to joining CNN, Tapper served as senior White House correspondent at ABC News.

55006.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
55006.description: Jake Tapper covers all the day's top stories around the country and the globe, from politics to money, sports to popular culture.
